landmarks.name: Tokyo Skytree
landmarks.address: 1-chōme-1-2 Oshiage, Sumida City, Tokyo 131-0045, Japan
landmarks.description: World's tallest freestanding broadcasting tower with an observation deck boasting 360-degree views.

landmarks.name: Tokyo Tower
landmarks.address: 4-chōme-2-8 Shibakōen, Minato City, Tokyo 105-0011, Japan
landmarks.description: Reminiscent of the Eiffel Tower, this landmark features observation areas & other attractions.

landmarks.name: Sensō-ji
landmarks.address: 2-chōme-3-1 Asakusa, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0032, Japan
landmarks.description: Completed in 645, this temple, Tokyo's oldest, was built to honor Kannon, the goddess of mercy.

landmarks.name: Omoide Yokocho Memory Lane
landmarks.address: 1 Chome-2 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0023, Japan
landmarks.description: Landmark alleyway featuring a selection of food stalls for simple fare & alcoholic drinks.

landmarks.name: Tokyo Night & Light
landmarks.address: 2-chōme-8-1 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 163-8001, Japan
landmarks.description: No description available.

landmarks.name: Notre-Dame Cathedral of Paris
landmarks.address: 6 Parvis Notre-Dame - Pl. Jean-Paul II, 75004 Paris, France
landmarks.description: Towering, 12th-century cathedral with flying buttresses & gargoyles, setting for Hugo's novel.

landmarks.name: Arc de Triomphe
landmarks.address: Pl. Charles de Gaulle, 75008 Paris, France
landmarks.description: Iconic triumphal arch built to commemorate Napoleon's victories, with an observation deck.

landmarks.name: Tuileries Garden
landmarks.address: 75001 Paris, France
landmarks.description: Expansive, 17th-century formal garden dotted with statues, including 18 bronzes by Maillol.

landmarks.name: Eiffel Tower
landmarks.address: Av. Gustave Eiffel, 75007 Paris, France
landmarks.description: Gustave Eiffel's iconic, wrought-iron 1889 tower, with steps and elevators to observation decks.

landmarks.name: Conciergerie
landmarks.address: 2 Bd du Palais, 75001 Paris, France
landmarks.description: Gothic, riverside fortress & French Revolution prison, housing Marie Antoinette's former cell.

landmarks.name: Top of The Rock
landmarks.address: 30 Rockefeller Plaza, New York, NY 10112, USA
landmarks.description: Observatory on top of Rockefeller Center, with an ocean-liner style design, offering city views.

landmarks.name: Empire State Building
landmarks.address: 20 W 34th St., New York, NY 10001, USA
landmarks.description: Iconic, art deco office tower from 1931 with exhibits & observatories on the 86th & 102nd floors.

landmarks.name: Statue of Liberty
landmarks.address: New York, NY 10004, USA
landmarks.description: Iconic National Monument opened in 1886, offering guided tours & a museum, plus harbor & city views.

landmarks.name: Central Park
landmarks.address: New York, NY, USA
landmarks.description: Sprawling park with pedestrian paths & ballfields, plus a zoo, carousel, boat rentals & a reservoir.

landmarks.name: The High Line
landmarks.address: New York, NY 10011, USA
landmarks.description: Popular park 30 feet above street level on an old rail line, with river & city views.

landmarks.name: London Eye
landmarks.address: Riverside Building, County Hall, Westminster Bridge Rd, London SE1 7PB, UK
landmarks.description: No description available.

landmarks.name: The London Dungeon
landmarks.address: Riverside Building, County Hall, Westminster Bridge Rd, London SE1 7PB, UK
landmarks.description: Costumed actors & themed fairground rides depicting macabre stories from London's past.

landmarks.name: Tower of London
landmarks.address: London EC3N 4AB, UK
landmarks.description: Centuries of bloody history around a medieval castle, home to Crown Jewels and iconic Beefeaters.

landmarks.name: The British Museum
landmarks.address: Great Russell St, London WC1B 3DG, UK
landmarks.description: Huge showcase for global antiquities, including Egyptian mummies and ancient Greek sculptures.

landmarks.name: Tower Bridge
landmarks.address: Tower Bridge Rd, London SE1 2UP, UK
landmarks.description: Panoramic views from high-level walkways and behind-the-scenes access to original lifting machinery.

landmarks.name: Shanghai Tower
landmarks.address: 501 Yin Cheng Zhong Lu, Lujiazui, Pu Dong Xin Qu, Shang Hai Shi, China, 200120
landmarks.description: 632-m. megatall skyscraper with 2 observation decks, plus restaurants, bars, shops & a hotel.

landmarks.name: Oriental Pearl TV Tower
landmarks.address: 1 Shi Ji Da Dao, Lujiazui, Pu Dong Xin Qu, Shang Hai Shi, China, 200120
landmarks.description: Futuristic TV tower (468-meters tall) offering city vistas, a history museum & revolving restaurant.

landmarks.name: Tianzifang
landmarks.address: 210弄 Tai Kang Lu, Huang Pu Qu, China, 200023
landmarks.description: This former French Concession area with narrow alleys is known for its quaint shops, cafes & bars.

landmarks.name: Yu Garden
landmarks.address: 四牌楼 Huangpu, Shanghai, China, 200000
landmarks.description: 5-acre garden built in 1577 that features Ming dynasty pavilions, ponds, rockeries & arched bridges.

landmarks.name: The Bund
landmarks.address: Zhong Shan Dong Yi Lu, Waitan, Huang Pu Qu, Shang Hai Shi, China, 200002
landmarks.description: Historic, 1,500-meter-long waterside promenade showcasing distinctive modern & colonial buildings.
